problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
